No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to eradicating poverty.

Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education (Target 4.3) for graduate students, developing academic research and pedagogical skills (Target 4.4). Studying Pre-Qin philosophy also promotes cultural diversity appreciation (Target 4.7).
evidence: Philosophy in Excavated Texts in the Pre-Qin Era

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course examines ancient texts on governance like '《治邦之道》' and '《治政之道》', directly relating to the philosophical foundations of effective institutions (Target 16.6) and addressing social issues (Core Competency C).
evidence: 運用哲學素養處理社會問題的能力 (Calibre of attending to social issues)
